findings.detail: Six nodes across two parallel LR subgraphs (Calculator, Vending machine). Each subgraph is a clean 3-node linear pipeline: start(blue) → auto(purple) → done(green). Governing concept 'Computation = Input → Process → Output (steps must be well-defined)' is in the config title field, not a node — satisfies title-discipline. All labels ≤ 4 words, plain English, trace directly to §5.1 and §5.4 corpus phrases. No concept drift. No bare acronyms. Color palette matches project spec exactly.

preflight.title_discipline_check: pass — governing concept in config title
preflight.single_path_check: pass — each subgraph is a linear 3-node chain
